q: 2001年の売上合計金額はいくらですか
sql:
SELECT SUM("s"."AMOUNT_SOLD") AS "total_sales"
FROM "SH"."SALES" "s"
INNER JOIN "SH"."TIMES" "t" ON "s"."TIME_ID" = "t"."TIME_ID"
WHERE EXTRACT(YEAR FROM "t"."TIME_ID") = 2001

q: 販売チャネルごとの売上合計を教えてください
sql:
SELECT 
    ch."CHANNEL_DESC" AS "販売チャネル",
    SUM(s."AMOUNT_SOLD") AS "売上合計"
FROM 
    "SH"."SALES" s
JOIN 
    "SH"."CHANNELS" ch ON s."CHANNEL_ID" = ch."CHANNEL_ID"
GROUP BY 
    ch."CHANNEL_DESC"
ORDER BY 
    "売上合計" DESC

q: 売上金額が最も多い商品カテゴリの上位3件は何ですか
sql:
SELECT p."PROD_CATEGORY", SUM(s."AMOUNT_SOLD") AS total_amount_sold
FROM "SH"."SALES" s
JOIN "SH"."PRODUCTS" p ON s."PROD_ID" = p."PROD_ID"
GROUP BY p."PROD_CATEGORY"
ORDER BY total_amount_sold DESC
FETCH FIRST 3 ROWS ONLY

q: 顧客数が多い国の上位5件を教えてください
sql:
SELECT "c"."COUNTRY_NAME", COUNT(DISTINCT "cu"."CUST_ID") AS "customer_count"
FROM "SH"."COUNTRIES" "c"
JOIN "SH"."CUSTOMERS" "cu" ON "c"."COUNTRY_ID" = "cu"."COUNTRY_ID"
GROUP BY "c"."COUNTRY_NAME"
ORDER BY "customer_count" DESC
FETCH FIRST 5 ROWS ONLY

q: 1999年に売上金額が最も大きかった商品トップ5は
sql:
SELECT p."PROD_NAME", SUM(s."AMOUNT_SOLD") AS total_amount_sold
FROM "SH"."SALES" s
JOIN "SH"."PRODUCTS" p ON s."PROD_ID" = p."PROD_ID"
JOIN "SH"."TIMES" t ON s."TIME_ID" = t."TIME_ID"
WHERE EXTRACT(YEAR FROM t."TIME_ID") = 1999
GROUP BY p."PROD_NAME"
ORDER BY total_amount_sold DESC
FETCH FIRST 5 ROWS ONLY

rows: Mini DV Camcorder with 3.5" Swivel LCD

q: 2001年の月別売上推移を見せてください
sql:
SELECT 
    EXTRACT(MONTH FROM t."TIME_ID") AS "月",
    SUM(s."AMOUNT_SOLD") AS "月別売上"
FROM 
    "SH"."TIMES" t
JOIN 
    "SH"."SALES" s ON t."TIME_ID" = s."TIME_ID"
WHERE 
    EXTRACT(YEAR FROM t."TIME_ID") = 2001
GROUP BY 
    EXTRACT(MONTH FROM t."TIME_ID")
ORDER BY 
    EXTRACT(MONTH FROM t."TIME_ID")

q: プロモーション別の売上合計の上位5件は
sql:
SELECT p.PROMO_NAME, SUM(s.AMOUNT_SOLD) AS total_sales
FROM "SH"."SALES" s
JOIN "SH"."PROMOTIONS" p ON s.PROMO_ID = p.PROMO_ID
GROUP BY p.PROMO_NAME
ORDER BY total_sales DESC
FETCH FIRST 5 ROWS ONLY

q: 平均販売単価が最も高い商品はどれですか
sql:
SELECT p."PROD_NAME" AS "商品名", 
       AVG(s."AMOUNT_SOLD" / s."QUANTITY_SOLD") AS "平均販売単価"
FROM "SH"."SALES" s
JOIN "SH"."PRODUCTS" p ON s."PROD_ID" = p."PROD_ID"
GROUP BY p."PROD_NAME"
ORDER BY "平均販売単価" DESC
FETCH FIRST 1 ROWS ONLY

q: 2001年で売上が最大だった四半期はいつですか
sql:
SELECT t."CALENDAR_QUARTER_DESC" AS max_quarter
FROM "SH"."TIMES" t
JOIN (
    SELECT s."TIME_ID", SUM(s."AMOUNT_SOLD") AS total_sold
    FROM "SH"."SALES" s
    WHERE EXTRACT(YEAR FROM s."TIME_ID") = 2001
    GROUP BY s."TIME_ID"
) s ON t."TIME_ID" = s."TIME_ID"
WHERE EXTRACT(YEAR FROM t."TIME_ID") = 2001
ORDER BY s.total_sold DESC
FETCH FIRST 1 ROWS ONLY

q: インターネットチャネルでの2000年の売上合計はいくらですか
sql:
SELECT SUM(s.AMOUNT_SOLD) AS total_sales
FROM "SH"."SALES" s
JOIN "SH"."CHANNELS" c ON s.CHANNEL_ID = c.CHANNEL_ID
JOIN "SH"."TIMES" t ON s.TIME_ID = t.TIME_ID
WHERE UPPER(c.CHANNEL_DESC) = 'INTERNET'
AND EXTRACT(YEAR FROM t.TIME_ID) = 2000
